'''鈭歭-t-zh-j''' ('''kalatzhejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:immaterialise|immaterialise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-t-zh-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:immaterialise|immaterialise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歭-t-zh-j
|-
! Lemma
| kalatzhejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilatzhejoko|thilatzhejoko]] || [[word:jilatzhejoko|jilatzhejoko]] || [[word:shilatzhejoko|shilatzhejoko]] || [[word:kilatzhejoko|kilatzhejoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholatzhejoko|tholatzhejoko]] || [[word:jolatzhejoko|jolatzhejoko]] || [[word:sholatzhejoko|sholatzhejoko]] || [[word:kolatzhejoko|kolatzhejoko]]
|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
